items.name: aspect-ratio
items.title: BTAspectRatio
items.description: Layout utility atom that constrains its child to a fixed aspect ratio with overflow clipping and rounded corners. Use as a wrapper for images, videos, or any content that must maintain a predictable proportion.

items.name: badge
items.title: BTBadge
items.description: Status label pill. Communicates the state or category of an entity (approved, pending, draft, etc.) via a colored pill with optional left/right icon.

items.name: button
items.title: BTButton
items.description: Interactive action button with 6 variants and 3 sizes. Supports left/right icon slots and a BTButton.iconOnly named constructor for icon-only square mode. Pass onPressed: null to disable.

items.name: button-group
items.title: BTButtonGroup
items.description: Horizontal group of related action buttons sharing borders, appearing as one unified control. Supports 5 variants, 2 sizes, and per-item variant mixing via BTButtonGroupItemDef.variant override.

items.name: button-link
items.title: BTButtonLink
items.description: Inline hyperlink-style action atom. Renders a text label with optional leading/trailing 16px icons. Hover shows underline + bold weight. Press dims to a neutral colour. Disabled greys out with text.disabled.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: BTCheckbox
items.description: Checkbox atom with 7 states: uncheck, check, indeterminate, disable-uncheck, disable-check, disable-indeterminate, and error. Supports optional label and subtext. Stateless — callers own checked/indeterminate values.

items.name: dropdown-list
items.title: BTDropdownList
items.description: Floating option list atom — purely presentational; caller handles positioning, filtering, and toggling visibility. Supports list, combobox (with avatars), checkbox, and radio variants. Empty items trigger a built-in empty-state illustration.

items.name: hint
items.title: BTHint
items.description: Notification indicator atom — renders as a solid red dot when count is null, or as a red badge showing the count; values above 99 display as "99+".

items.name: kbd
items.title: BTKbd
items.description: Keyboard key badge for displaying shortcut keys or hotkey combinations. Use BTKbdGroup to render a horizontal shortcut combo (e.g. ⌘ + K).

items.name: loading
items.title: BTLoading
items.description: Multi-type loading indicator. Six named constructors: spinner (Lottie rotating rings), pulse (Lottie pulsing dots), skeleton (shimmer via Skeletonizer), skeletonLeaf (single Skeleton.leaf), progressbar (LinearProgressIndicator), logo (Lottie btech brand animation).

items.name: radio-button
items.title: BTRadioButton
items.description: Radio selection atom — use multiple BTRadioButton<T> with the same groupValue and onChanged to form a radio group, mirroring Flutter's native Radio pattern.

items.name: scrollbar
items.title: BTScrollbar
items.description: Token-styled scrollbar wrapper using RawScrollbar. Thumb: bg.subtlest (neutral-300), Track: bg.subtle (neutral-50), 5dp thick, radius 8dp.

items.name: separator
items.title: BTSeparator
items.description: A 1px visual divider line. Renders horizontal (full-width) or vertical (full-height) using the border.primary token.

items.name: slider
items.title: BTSlider
items.description: Interactive range slider atom. Supports three layout types (defaults, range, vertical) and two color variants (defaults, error). Uses Flutter's native Slider/RangeSlider with SliderTheme overrides. Custom 24px thumb with 2.5px white border, dark pill tooltip.

items.name: switch-field
items.title: BTSwitchField
items.description: Toggle switch atom with animated track + thumb. Supports on/off, disabled, and error states. Labels and subtext can appear on left, right, or both sides. An inner text variant shows a short label inside the pill track.

items.name: tag
items.title: BTTag
items.description: Removable pill label atom. Supports default and outline variants, optional left icon, and an optional remove (×) callback. Use BTTagGroup to render multiple tags in a scrollable row or wrapping layout.

items.name: toggle
items.title: BTToggle
items.description: Pressable pill toggle atom — caller controls pressed state; component fires onChanged(!pressed) on tap. Pass onChanged: null to disable.

items.name: toggle-group
items.title: BTToggleGroup
items.description: Selection-state container for BTToggle items — owns selection state internally. Supports single-selection and multiple-selection modes via separate named constructors.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: BTTooltip
items.description: Hover / tap tooltip wrapping a trigger widget. Shows a dark-background floating balloon with a rounded-tip arrow caret. Supports plain text or rich widget content. Mobile: tap to toggle; desktop: hover.

items.name: alert
items.title: BTAlert
items.description: Contextual feedback banner with icon, label, optional description, optional action button/link, and optional dismiss button. BTAlert.show() provides a programmatic toast-style overlay API.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: BTAlertDialog
items.description: Modal confirmation/information dialog. Mobile (M) design — 296px wide, vertical button stack (Confirm on top, Cancel below). Use BTAlertDialog.show() for a centred overlay via showDialog.

items.name: avatar
items.title: BTAvatar
items.description: Circular badge displaying a user's profile image or auto-derived initials. Supports skeleton loading state. Used standalone or inside BTAvatarGroup (organism) for stacked group displays.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: BTBreadcrumb
items.description: Compositional breadcrumb system with 6 building-block widgets. Compose BTBreadcrumb > BTBreadcrumbItem > (BTBreadcrumbLink | BTBreadcrumbPage | BTBreadcrumbEllipsis) with BTBreadcrumbSeparator between items.

items.name: chart
items.title: BTChart
items.description: Chart molecule family for Flutter. Bundles three public widgets — BTBarChart (basic / grouped / stacked), BTLineChart (line / area), and BTCircleChart (donut) — plus the BTChartColors palette and shared data models. Painted natively with custom BT tooltip + legend styling.

items.name: dropdown
items.title: BTDropdown
items.description: Composable dropdown molecule — handles overlay positioning internally using OverlayPortal. Supports single and multi-select, optional search, and a custom trigger builder. Composes BTDropdownList internally.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: BTDropdownMenu
items.description: Action menu molecule that opens a floating panel of labelled items, group headers, separators, and optional keyboard shortcuts. Trigger via builder function; items via flat BTDropdownMenuEntry<T> list.

items.name: input
items.title: BTInput
items.description: Material M3 outlined-style text input with floating label. Foundation of the btech input family. Supports label chips (leftLabel/rightLabel), all text types, password toggle, multiline, char count, prefix/suffix, clearable, and Flutter Form validator integration.

items.name: input-search
items.title: BTInputSearch
items.description: Search input preset of BTInput — magnifying-glass prefix + clear button + onSearch callback on Enter.

items.name: input-text-area
items.title: BTInputTextArea
items.description: Multiline text input preset of BTInput. Forces multiline=true, defaults showCharCount=true when maxLength is set, and defaults minLines=5.

items.name: item
items.title: BTItem
items.description: Generic list item row with optional left media (icon/avatar/image), title+description, and optional right action (button/label/icon). Three container types: default, outline, muted.

items.name: navigation-menu
items.title: BTNavigationMenu
items.description: Bottom navigation bar with two variants: default (standard tab row, 2–5 items) and centerButton (notched bar + floating gradient action button, 0/2/4 items). Fully composable icon slots accept any Widget. Colors configurable via selectedColor / unselectedColor props with context.btColor defaults.

items.name: pagination
items.title: BTPagination
items.description: Data pagination molecule — three factory variants: full numbered page pills, rows-per-page display with dropdown, and a simple Step N of M navigator.

items.name: step-number
items.title: BTStepNumber
items.description: Reusable step/page pill widget — a 32×32 page-pill button with five visual states: Default, Hover, Active, Disabled, Ellipsis. Used internally by BTPagination; can also be used standalone.

items.name: tabs
items.title: BTTabs
items.description: Tab strip molecule with two variants: segmented (pill tray) and line (underline). Controlled widget — caller manages activeIndex state. Supports optional leading/trailing icon builders per tab index.

items.name: tooltip-pagination-step
items.title: BTTooltipPaginationStep
items.description: PaginationStep / onboarding step balloon with navigation buttons. Standalone and presentational — positioning relative to the target element is the caller's responsibility (Flutter: Positioned + Stack; web: absolute/fixed container).

items.name: tree
items.title: BTTree
items.description: Recursive data-driven tree component. Pass a list of BTTreeNode objects — nesting depth is inferred from children lists, expand/collapse is animated via AnimatedSize, and level-based background tinting is applied automatically.

items.name: accordion
items.title: BTAccordion
items.description: Three-component accordion system. BTAccordion is the group wrapper managing open state. BTAccordionItem is the individual collapsible panel (default visual: separator-based). BTAccordionCard is a self-contained expandable card with its own header (title + chevron).

items.name: avatar-group
items.title: BTAvatarGroup
items.description: Stacked group of BTAvatar widgets with horizontal negative-margin overlap. Renders a "+N" overflow counter when items exceed `max`. Stacking offsets match Figma 504:705 specs.

items.name: calendar
items.title: BTCalendar
items.description: Calendar date picker for Flutter. Supports single date, date range, time-only, and date+time selection. Provides static show*() factory methods for modal-dialog or bottom-sheet drawer presentation.

items.name: card
items.title: BTCard
items.description: Flexible card organism with three visual variants: default (full card with optional body + Cancel/Submit footer), small (compact, no footer), and image (top image + default structure). Footer uses BTButton atoms.

items.name: carousel
items.title: BTCarousel
items.description: Horizontal or vertical sliding carousel with native swipe physics, animated dot indicators, and optional navigation buttons. Uses PageView.builder internally for smooth scroll on mobile.

items.name: chart-card
items.title: BTChartCard
items.description: Card wrapper for a chart. Header (title + optional subtext), an arbitrary chart widget body, and optional summary + legend areas. Card chrome can be toggled off via hasCard.

items.name: data-table
items.title: BTDataTable
items.description: Full-featured data table — sticky/fixed columns, checkbox selection, expandable rows, an optional toolbar (search + filters + actions) and built-in pagination.

items.name: direction
items.title: BTDirection
items.description: Form panel organism with a header (title + optional subtext + optional link), a content slot, and a footer with primary and optional secondary action buttons.

items.name: drawer
items.title: BTDrawer
items.description: Bottom-sheet drawer (M-Drawer). The inline BTDrawer widget renders the panel itself (drag handle + header + scrollable body + stacked footer). Use BTDrawerSheet.show() to display it as a modal bottom sheet with a scrim barrier.

items.name: empty-state
items.title: BTEmptyState
items.description: Empty / error placeholder with an illustration, title, subtext and an optional action button. The illustration is chosen by the variant.

items.name: modal
items.title: BTModal
items.description: Centred dialog panel with header, optional content, and footer — the widget itself is the panel (328 dp wide), not a full route. Use BTModal.show() to display with a barrier and backdrop dismissal.

items.name: sidebar
items.title: BTSidebar
items.description: Collapsible navigation sidebar. 258 px open → 64 px collapsed. Supports three-level nav hierarchy (Main → Submenu → Sub Submenu), section subtitles, dividers, optional search, header, and footer.

items.name: toast
items.title: BTToast
items.description: Toast notification system. BTToast renders the card; BTToastController is the imperative API that inserts toasts into the nearest Overlay. 6 types (default, success, error, warning, info, description) and 2 positions (top, bottom).
